fields.label: Sender Batch ID
fields.description: A sender-specified ID number. Tracks the payout in an accounting system.

fields.label: Items
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: itemsValues, itemsValues.recipientType, itemsValues.receiverValue, itemsValues.currency, itemsValues.amount, itemsValues.note, itemsValues.senderItemId, itemsValues.recipientWallet)

fields.label: Items
fields.description: An array of individual payout items

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: emailSubject, emailMessage, note)

fields.label: Payout Batch ID
fields.description: The ID of the payout for which to show details

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

endpoints.label: Cancel Payout Item

fields.label: Payout Item ID
fields.description: The ID of the payout item to cancel
